name: Occupational Tax Succession Rights

eligibility.description: Requires registration of the succession or relocation with the Secretary to transfer the existing tax credit to the new person or location.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows certain successors (spouses, heirs, or bankruptcy trustees) or relocating businesses to continue operations for the remainder of the tax year without paying a new occupational tax.
